title: patis coreana
intro: Patis coreana, a type of flowering plant native to East Asia, is also known as the Korean bellflower. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of patis coreana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Patis coreana is commonly prepared as a tea or extract, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Zhong yao cai = Zhongyaocai = Journal of Chinese medicinal materials", Patis Coreana (also known as Patrinia scabra) may have erythrocyte immunoregulation effects, including prolonging life expectancy and improving erythrocyte immunologic function in mice with transplanted tumors.
